context_for_next_testing_agent: REGRESSION TESTING COMPLETE. All 4 cross-item interaction tests passed. KEY FINDINGS: (1) CROSS-1: Boot-to-Settlement-to-Credit flow works - 6 boot items, 6 KPI cards in Settlement, TOTAL CREDIT in Credit Management, no Popular tab. (2) CROSS-2: Insights navigation works - no 'check in' items, all reports load. (3) CROSS-3: Sidebar combined interaction works - renamed labels (Daily Report, Daily Summary, Daily Room Report, Item Ledger), sticky bottom. (4) CROSS-4: CRITICAL SECURITY - Cache isolation verified, no data leak between Welcome Resort and Palm House accounts. All ~30 files touched in this sprint work correctly together.
